changelog: 2026-07-02: initial defaults proposed by agent (see references/prioritization-model.md)

criteria.name: role_fit
criteria.description: Must-have coverage from evidence map (mirror fit_score)

criteria.name: comp_potential
criteria.description: Expected comp vs user's target range; estimates labeled

criteria.name: company_quality
criteria.description: Stability, trajectory, engineering reputation, user interest

criteria.name: location_remote
criteria.description: Compatibility with location/remote constraints; 1 = violates (forces low)

criteria.name: growth_path
criteria.description: Career trajectory value: scope growth, learning, brand

criteria.name: likelihood
criteria.description: Realistic odds: seniority match, posting age, competition

criteria.name: interview_cost
criteria.description: Inverted effort: 5 = light process, 1 = long gauntlet
